MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Nils Rosenquest, Esq. 292-0980 for Petitioner NANTUCKET VENTURES, LLC moving party
Rafal Ofierski, Deputy City Attorney 554-4721 for respondent RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION BOARD

ARGUED AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED -- Writ granted as to redetermination of rent based on improper capital improvement pass-through in 1984. Denied as to determination of rent reduction for loss of storage space. (AJR/al) Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
